title: July 20th, 2022
body:
#07/18 2022 - 07/24 2022

https://open.spotify.com/

agenda

 trash
(july 20th, 2022)

https://www.google.com/calendar/event?eid=nzvpnjhkcgtjy28zywi5z2m4cw04yjlrnzrxbwfiyjfjowkzogjintywcty0y2honmxqm2fvcgo2mf8ymdiymdcymfqymtawmdbaigjtb3jlbm81nebt

possibilities

scratch paper

add [face](face) soap to heb shopping list

pick up canvases

anywhere besides 5below? save trip for noble

pick up flower

would i like to leverage not having any flower or smoking buddies atm

make a people i care about update template

include subtemplates for non-daily people

queries/tweets in progress

queries/todos

todone

filed for unemployment

https://www.twc.texas.gov/jobseekers/unemployment-benefits-services

logged in. udated password in google

submitted application

https://apps.twc.state.tx.us/ubs/afb/nextsteps.do

attach pdfs

apply for benefits every two weeks starting on july 31

register for work

https://apps.twc.state.tx.us/ubs/workintexas.do

be prepared to share records of three job search activities a week

check on application process

https://apps.twc.state.tx.us/ubs/afb/generalinformation.do

https://www.workintexas.com/vosnet/dashboards/default.aspx?menuid=menu_start_page_dashboard

yogurt and blt for breakfast

ramona benson and atticus benson stopped by. hopped on the trampoline with him. talked about hanging out at our house with noble soon

recorded some more lyrics on fear not, man



much love to the people who think they're not rambling about nonsense

related:

communication is the machete we use to hack the jungles between us. each word a whack. every statement a risky adventure in some hopeful direction. occasionally you'll stop and listen to the jungle-filtered hacking somewhere nearby, thriftily taking advantage of the moment to relax and reorient your self. if you forget to stop and listen, here are some tips for getting unlost:

just stop

now listen

if you find yourself hacking away again but notice that you still feel unoriented, return to step one

#twitter feed

rob hardy 🦎 (ungatedcreative):
more specifically, my old way of building an oasis was firmly rooted in traditional marketing. it all stemmed from a top-down understanding your market/niche

now that i've shifted to non-coercive marketing, and a bottom-up worldview, i'm approaching it wayyyyyy differently now
